ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game took place */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the game (e.g., Final) */,
  "home_team_wins" INTEGER /* Indicates if the home team won */,
  "venue" TEXT /* The name of the venue where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of fans attending the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* The type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoff) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city where the team is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* The year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The player's nationality */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The player's jersey number */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team performing in the game */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the team */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the team */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the team */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected by the team */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the team */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the team */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the team */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the team */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds (combines offensive and defensive rebounds) */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed by the team */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds (combines offensive and defensive rebounds) */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* The year of the season (e.g., 2020, 2021) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the season is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the playoffs (if applicable) */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the playoffs (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded" TEXT /* The year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* The name of the league's commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The coach's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The coach's nationality */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* The coach's win percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The referee's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The referee's nationality */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of refereeing experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_referees" (
  "game_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-referee mapping */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_referees_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fan */,
  "favorite_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan's favorite team */,
  "age" INTEGER /* The fan's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The fan's gender (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "email" TEXT /* The fan's email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The fan's phone number for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendances" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game attended */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan attending the game */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* The seat number of the fan */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* The gate number where the fan entered the venue */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* The time the fan entered the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for overall statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Points scored against the team */,
  "average_points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored by the team per game */,
  "average_points_against_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored against the team per game */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
